CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date Date, event_datetime DateTime);
SELECT event_date, changeDay(event_date, 10) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < toDate('2023-01-01');
SELECT changeDay(d.event_date, 10) FROM test_dates d JOIN test_dates e ON d.event_date = e.event_date WHERE e.event_date = toDate('1999-01-01');
SELECT changeDay(changeDay(adr.event_date, 5), 10) FROM (SELECT event_date FROM test_dates) AS adr WHERE adr.event_date > toDate('1998-12-31');
